parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor nsq
participant GuideTaskCrmVisitAssignListener
participant guideTaskCrmVisitAssignProcessor
participant GuideTaskAssignDomainService
participant ShoppingGuideReadApi
participant GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy
participant GuideTaskAssignFactory
participant GuideTaskAssignRepository
participant GuideTaskRepository
participant NsqProducer

nsq -> GuideTaskCrmVisitAssignListener : 1 下发任务
activate GuideTaskCrmVisitAssignListener

GuideTaskCrmVisitAssignListener -> guideTaskCrmVisitAssignProcessor : 2 开始处理
activate guideTaskCrmVisitAssignProcessor

guideTaskCrmVisitAssignProcessor -> GuideTaskAssignDomainService : 3 任务分配
activate GuideTaskAssignDomainService
note left of GuideTaskAssignDomainService : 下发给所有部门

GuideTaskAssignDomainService -> ShoppingGuideReadApi : 4 查询下发对象 department
activate ShoppingGuideReadApi

GuideTaskAssignDomainService -> GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy : 5 分配任务
activate GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy

note left of GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy : 只有任务下发给导购的时候\n才创建导购的任务明细
GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy -> GuideTaskAssignFactory : 6 创建分配的任务实体
activate GuideTaskAssignFactory

group Transaction
    GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy -> GuideTaskAssignRepository : 7 保存分配状态 status flow 任务流转至 分配完成
    activate GuideTaskAssignRepository
    GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy -> GuideTaskRepository : 8 保存分配状态 status flow 任务流转至 待启动
    activate GuideTaskRepository
end

GuideTaskAssignDomainService -> NsqProducer : 9 发送下发完成消息，准备启动任务
activate NsqProducer

@enduml
```
